comment_text.sn19.6:1.4: Struck by spears like those he used to bring down his deer quarry.

root_text.sn19.6:1.1: “Idhāhaṁ, āvuso, gijjhakūṭā pabbatā orohanto addasaṁ sattilomaṁ purisaṁ vehāsaṁ gacchantaṁ.
root_text.sn19.6:1.2: Tassa tā sattiyo uppatitvā uppatitvā tasseva kāye nipatanti.
root_text.sn19.6:1.4: eso, bhikkhave, satto imasmiṁyeva rājagahe māgaviko ahosi …pe….

translation_text.sn19.6:1.1: “Just now, reverend, as I was descending from Vulture’s Peak Mountain I saw a man whose body hairs were spears flying through the air.
translation_text.sn19.6:1.2: And those spears kept rising up and falling on his body
translation_text.sn19.6:1.4: “That being used to be a deer hunter right here in Rājagaha. …”
